task_completion.description: Verify that a system user account was created for Anita Oliver with the correct email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo 'Users' list or a User form view displaying the name 'Anita Oliver' and the Email Address / Login 'anita.oliver@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user was granted 'Officer' permissions for the Recruitment application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Access Rights' tab in the User form for Anita Oliver. Under the 'Human Resources' or application settings section, the 'Recruitment' dropdown must be set to 'Officer'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user has no system administration rights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Access Rights' tab in the User form for Anita Oliver. The 'Administration' dropdown must be empty, blank, or explicitly set to 'None'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the existing employee record for Anita Oliver.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'Employees' application with the employee profile for 'Anita Oliver' opened.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new user account is linked to the existing employee record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'HR Settings' tab on the Employee form for Anita Oliver; the 'Related User' field should be populated with 'Anita Oliver'. Alternatively, look at the User form where a 'Related Employee' field is set to 'Anita Oliver'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to create the user and set permissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web GUI (Settings, Users, Employees apps) being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out and saved the forms in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form submission, such as the 'Save' button being clicked or the form transitioning from edit mode to a saved state with the new data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of psql, pgAdmin, or terminal windows executing SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employee name is 'Anita Oliver' and the login email must be 'anita.oliver@example.com'. The required permission level for the Recruitment application is 'Officer' (which corresponds to the backend group hr_recruitment.group_hr_recruitment_user). The user must not have system administration rights. The user account must be linked to the existing employee record for Anita Oliver.
